name: Flex AI Copilot Failures Generating Notes

incident_updates.body: The issue creating notes using the AI Summarization feature has been resolved and the Agent Copilot UI within Flex is operating normally at this time.
The Agent Copilot UI within Flex is now operating normally. We will continue to monitor for system stability. We'll provide another update in 2 hours or as soon as more information becomes available.

Our engineers have identified the issue causing approximately 30% of wrap-up notes generation requests to fail in the Agent Copilot UI within Flex. This may prevent some users from creating notes using the AI Summarization feature. We are working to deploy a fix and expect to provide another update in 1 hour or as soon as more information becomes available.

We are currently investigating an issue where approximately 30% of wrap-up notes generation requests are failing in the Agent Copilot UI within Flex. SMS Delivery Delays and Failures from Twilio to Orange/Sonatel Senegal

incident_updates.body: The incident has been resolved and SMS from Twilio to Orange/Sonatel network subscribers in Senegal is operating normally.

affected_components.name: CARRIER NETWORK - SMS, Middle East & Africa

incident_updates.body: Twilio customers may be experiencing SMS delivery delays and failures from Twilio to Orange/Sonatel network subscribers in Senegal. Our team has identified the cause, and is working to resolve the issue. We will provide another update in 24 hours or as soon as more information becomes available.

name: SMS Delivery Failures from Twilio to Claro Chile

incident_updates.body: The incident has been resolved and SMS delivery from Twilio to Claro network subscribers in Chile is operating normally.

We have observed a recovery in SMS delivery from Twilio to Claro network subscribers in Chile and are monitoring service stability. We will provide another update in 2 hours or as soon as more information becomes available.

Twilio customers may be experiencing SMS delivery failures from Twilio to Claro network subscribers in Chile. Our team is actively investigating this issue. We will provide another update in 1 hour or as soon as more information becomes available.
